Home / Service Areas / Sapulpa

Towing in Sapulpa, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Sapulpa and surrounding communities

Serving Sapulpa, OK

Onyx Towing delivers reliable towing and recovery services in Sapulpa, covering Route 66 and the Turner Turnpike. Whether you're near the Sapulpa Historical Museum or in need of help on I-44, our team is ready to assist. We handle everything from motorcycle towing to long-distance transport.

Sapulpa is a historic city with deep ties to Oklahoma's Route 66 heritage.

Towing Services in Sapulpa

Emergency Towing

24/7 rapid response when your vehicle won't move.

Learn more →

Roadside Assistance

Jump starts, lockouts, and tire changes across Tulsa County.

Learn more →

Motorcycle Towing

Specialized transport for bikes with proper tie-downs.

Learn more →

Heavy Duty Towing

Commercial and industrial towing for Tulsa businesses.

Learn more →

Private Property Towing

Authorized vehicle removal for Tulsa property managers.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Sapulpa and the surrounding area.
